item.title: DFC approves $100M for African health infrastructure fund
item.description: The US International Development Finance Corporation has approved a $100M commitment to an African health infrastructure debt fund. CARE and Heifer International are cornerstone LPs via sub-advisor Bamboo Capital.

item.title: FMO co-invests in Mercy Corps Ventures fund II
item.description: Dutch development bank FMO co-invests alongside DFC in Mercy Corps Ventures' second fund, targeting digital infrastructure for smallholder farmers in East Africa.
